data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limits product options to streamline decision-making and reduce customer friction.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation and fewer clicks to reach key actions.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design ensures easily accessible navigation and actions for enhanced usability.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable buttons and elements positioned for quick access.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Maintains familiar interactions to meet user expectations based on web norms.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI pattern as seen across similar e-commerce platforms.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Utilizes grouping techniques to assist in visual hierarchy and content organization.
data.technical_spec: Emphasis on proximity, similarity, and closure in layout design.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: An attractive design is provided to enhance perceived usability even with complex systems.
data.technical_spec: Use of appealing color schemes, typography, and visual elements.
